description_long: This object is a modern, flat-panel computer monitor with a minimalist, rectangular design and a matte black finish. The display area is framed by a thin bezel, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The monitor is supported by a geometric, rectangular stand that extends backward, providing stability and a slight elevation above the surface. The rear of the monitor is flat and unadorned, with no visible buttons, ports, or branding. The side profile reveals the monitor's slim depth and the angular, open-frame construction of the stand. The overall design is utilitarian and understated, suitable for both office and public urban environments.
description: A slim, matte black computer monitor with a thin bezel and a geometric rectangular stand, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the flat back panel and the open rectangular stand structure.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the monitor's slim depth and the angular, open-frame stand.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide, flat screen area and the supporting stand beneath.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again emphasizing the thinness of the monitor and the stand's open design.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and uniform in thickness, with a matte black finish and sharp rectangular corners. There are no visible decorative elements or color contrasts.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a rectangular, open-frame pedestal made of what appears to be metal or rigid plastic, extending backward for stability. It has a geometric, angular design with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
